zh.South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比
zh.Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes d'Aubeney於1306年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福時，她的父親Sir Helias De Aubeney45歲，母親Joan de Guernsey39歲。她於大約1334年與Sir Richard Waldegrave I在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1350年在她的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比
zh-hans.Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes d'Aubeney于1306年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福时，她的父亲Sir Helias De Aubeney45岁，母亲Joan de Guernsey39岁。她于大约1334年与Sir Richard Waldegrave I在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1350年在她的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aubeney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Daubney
meanings: English (mainly Lincolnshire; of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from any of several places in northern France called Aubigny, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Albinius (a derivative of Latin albus ‘white’; compare Albin ) + the habitational suffix -acum. Compare Dabney .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes d'Aubeney was born in 1306, in Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Helias De Aubeney, was 45 and her mother, Joan de Guernsey, was 39. She married Sir Richard Waldegrave I about 1334, in Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1350, in her hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes d'Aubeney est née en 1306, à Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Helias De Aubeney, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Joan de Guernsey, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Waldegrave I environ 1334, à Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1350, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes d'Aubeney 1306 in Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Helias De Aubeney 45 und ihre Mutter Joan de Guernsey 39. Sie hat um 1334 in Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Waldegrave I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 44 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes d'Aubeney è nata il nel 1306 nel Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir Helias De Aubeney, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Joan de Guernsey, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Waldegrave I circa 1334, nel Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1350, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes d'Aubeneyが1306年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワルグラブで生まれた時，父Sir Helias De Aubeneyは45歳，母Joan de Guernseyは39歳であった。約1334年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワルグラブでSir Richard Waldegrave Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1350年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes d'Aubeney(이)가 1306년 영국 노르섬프토실르 월그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Helias De Aubeney(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Guernsey(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 월그레이브에서 Sir Richard Waldegrave I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 그녀의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes d'Aubeney nasceu em 1306, em Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Helias De Aubeney, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Guernsey, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Waldegrave I aproximadamente 1334, em Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1350, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes d'Aubeney родилась в 1306 г. в местности валграв, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Helias De Aubeney было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Guernsey, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Waldegrave I около 1334 г. в местности валграв, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1350 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes d'Aubeney nació en 1306, en Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Helias De Aubeney, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Joan de Guernsey, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Waldegrave I aproximadamente 1334, en Walgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1350, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
